creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Dienstag, 21. Oktober 2008 01:00:19 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of textproc/lucene,
>
> Please note that PR ports/128254 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128254


For me it's ok.
Please commit it.

Thank you

Gerrit
